$comment: GENERATED by scripts/emit-keyset.mjs at build (tsup onSuccess) — do not edit by hand. Cross-language keyset for the Python Report-Engine consumer (Guard-Kit §7). Carries the full M7 vocabulary + context model so check_compliance can be re-implemented identically. Matching contract: word-stem/word forms match at word boundaries (case-sensitive for matchType 'word' = AI); phrase forms match the ordered word sequence with intervening non-word chars; a token is a violation unless an allowedContext fires (negation cue within `proximity` words before the match in the same sentence | match inside a compound `pattern` | match offset inside a caller-supplied disclaimer range).

allowedContexts.pattern: usda guarantee fee
allowedContexts.note: USDA's named 'guarantee fee' is a real loan-program term, not an advertising claim.

allowedContexts.pattern: loan guarantee program
allowedContexts.note: Named government program (e.g. VA/USDA loan guarantee program).

allowedContexts.pattern: guarantee of value
allowedContexts.note: 'not a guarantee of value' appraisal/disclosure phrasing.

allowedContexts.pattern: negation cue (not|never|no|isn't|won't…) within proximity words before the match, same sentence
allowedContexts.note: Affirmative-claim rule: the token is forbidden only as an affirmative claim. A negated/NOT-THAT use ('not a guarantee', 'this is not an approval') is compliant. Proven by the 7 live ACTIVE HecmContent rows (spec S3) whose forbidden tokens sit only inside NOT-THAT lines.

allowedContexts.pattern: negation cue (not|never|no|isn't|won't…) within proximity words before the match, same sentence
allowedContexts.note: Affirmative-claim rule: the token is forbidden only as an affirmative claim. A negated/NOT-THAT use ('not a guarantee', 'this is not an approval') is compliant. Proven by the 7 live ACTIVE HecmContent rows (spec S3) whose forbidden tokens sit only inside NOT-THAT lines.

allowedContexts.pattern: objection-handler / negation line
allowedContexts.note: Objection-handler copy ('a common worry is you "won't lose your home" — here's the reality…') frames it as a cited fear, not an affirmative promise.

allowedContexts.pattern: match offset within a caller-supplied disclaimerRanges block
allowedContexts.note: Illustrative/disclaimer banners (Report-Engine ILLUSTRATIVE_BANNER 'Illustrative — not a loan offer, quote, or approval.'; Rello illustrative banners) legitimately name the forbidden tokens inside a clearly-marked disclaimer. The caller marks the range; fail-safe-strict if it does not (an unmarked banner HARD_BLOCKs).

allowedContexts.pattern: open ai
allowedContexts.note: External proper noun (OpenAI). Belt-and-suspenders — the case-sensitive whole-word match already skips 'OpenAI' (no word boundary before 'AI').

allowedContexts.pattern: google ai
allowedContexts.note: External proper noun (a named third-party product, not a description of Milo).
